title: S29-05: RSI smoke test — end-to-end loop verified, 3 bugs fixed (cursor format, context overflow, stdout capture)
body: --findings Pipeline confirmed working: emily-agent RSI cycles → Apple filing → obs-watcher dispatch → context-overflow recovery → fresh-session retry. Blocked at final dispatch by Anthropic API credit balance (pre-existing). Three bugs found and fixed: (1) batch cursor no-hyphen format mismatch silently skipping all new obs, (2) isContextTooLongOutput never firing because claude writes to stdout not stderr, (3) obs-watcher missing all but 4 of 25 go source files (go run main.go vs go run .). All fixes committed and pushed.
